productName: 420 Mini Day and Night Live Rosin Chocolates (Milk CBN & Dark Choc Sea Salt CBG)
description: A premium chocolate treat with old-world dessert energy: silky texture, warm cocoa aroma, and a refined cannabis finish that makes each bite feel indulgent. It blends CBG to support daytime focus and clarity and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest. A craveable infused treat that feels right at home next to the best sweets on the shelf.
